# Muhammad Azrulhadi Fikrullah
Marketing Technology & Automation Specialist with a Computer Science and Cybersecurity foundation.

## Role & Expertise
- Specialized in building secure, data-driven marketing ecosystems.
- Expert in CRM lifecycle automation (ActiveCampaign) and workflow integration (Pabbly, Webhooks).
- Focused on 95% attribution accuracy using UTM tagging and custom tracking protocols.

## Key Achievements
- Increased webinar attendance to 30%+ through automated segmentation and reminder workflows.
- Contributed 10% of annual revenue through multi-stage customer journey optimization.
- Recipient of the "Eagle of the Year 2024" award for marketing system optimization.

## Technical Engineering Tools
The portfolio includes a dedicated /tools/ directory featuring custom-built utilities:
- Secure Webhook Guard: Generates Cloudflare WAF rules to protect integration endpoints from bot traffic.
- Clean-Trace UTM Builder: Ensures data integrity and XSS protection for marketing attribution links.

## Infrastructure & Security
- Certified in CompTIA SecurityX, CySA+, and PenTest+.
- Implements security best practices in web infrastructure, including Cloudflare CDN and WAF hardening.
- Uses serverless backend (Google Apps Script) for private, secure lead management and UTM capture.

## Core Skills
- CRM: ActiveCampaign, Logic Segmentation, Behavior-based Lead Scroring, Lead Lifecycle Workflows[cite: 10].
- Automation tools: Webhooks, Pabbly, Meta Ads API integration[cite: 14, 15].
- Security: Cloudflare WAF, Bot Mitigation, CompTIA CySA+/PenTest+[cite: 72, 75].
- Data Analytic: Google Analytics, Pivot Table, Looker Studio.
- Conversion Tracking: Pixel, Custom Events.
